data.description:
## What
Remove: PROJECT_ROOT (config.py + ~23 sites; REBAR_ROOT only), TICKET_CMD (dead validate.py branch), _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO (dead event_append.py flag), TICKET_SYNC_CMD (dead shell=True ticket-sync; replace sync-before-compact with a direct in-process pull or drop). Param-ify REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE (read paths pass no_mutate=True; delete os.environ set/pop). Self-resolve in subprocesses + delete: REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH (engine_env handoffs -> call in_process_cli()/wordlist_path() directly).

## Files
config.py, _engine_support/validate.py, _store/event_append.py, _commands/compact.py, _commands/fsck.py, __init__.py, _engine.py, _engine/rebar_reconciler/{applier,reconcile,invariants}.py, reducer/_alias.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All listed vars removed; subprocess handoffs self-resolve
- [ ] fsck read-paths use the no_mutate param (no env mutation); CLI fsck still mutates
- [ ] sync-before-compact is a direct in-process pull or removed (no shell=True)
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: EV-2: remove dead/internal vars + self-resolve subprocess handoffs
